Details: Two Python automation scripts for Azure Synapse to Fabric migration with validation capabilities. migration_validation_script provides comprehensive end-to-end migration validation with Delta export and ADLS integration, while dimension_population_script focuses specifically on dimension table population (DIM_INSTITUTION, DIM_CORPORATION, DIM_PRODUCT) with REST API integration. Both scripts share similar architectural patterns but differ in scope and implementation details.

Both scripts address Synapse to Fabric migration with validation but with different scopes. migration_validation_script provides general-purpose migration validation while dimension_population_script focuses on specific dimension tables. Both implement similar core concepts: authentication, data export, ADLS transfer, Fabric execution, and comparison logic. However, migration_validation_script is more comprehensive with Delta format support and broader table handling, while dimension_population_script is more targeted with REST API integration and specific table focus.

Both scripts follow nearly identical structural patterns: imports/setup, configuration loading, authentication functions, execution phases, data export, ADLS transfer, Fabric setup, comparison logic, and cleanup. The main structural differences are in implementation details - migration_validation_script uses more sophisticated Delta export and direct SQL connections, while dimension_population_script uses REST API calls and parquet format. Both maintain the same logical flow and decomposition approach.
